title: scrophularia elymaitica
intro: Scrophularia elymaitica, also known as Elymaic Figwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Scrophularia elymaitica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Scrophularia elymaitica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for various health applications.
